name: Justice League RPG
description:
The dust of the last great crisis has settled, but the cracks in the world have yet to fully heal. You have entered an era where gods walk the earth in primary colors, wielding unimaginable power, yet bleed and break just like the mortals they swear to protect.

A new age of heroism is being forged. In Washington D.C., the gleaming Hall of Justice rises as a public beacon of hope, while high above, the orbital Watchtower serves as the silent, vigilant eye over a fragile planet. But the light of the Trinity casts long, dangerous shadows. For every soaring triumph in the skies of Metropolis, there is a brutal, desperate war waged in the rain-slicked alleyways of Gotham. For every champion of truth, there are secret societies, cosmic warlords, and calculating rogues waiting in the dark to tear it all down.

The legacy of the cape is a heavy burden. It demands unimaginable sacrifice, unyielding resolve, and the agonizing knowledge that every choice has a consequence.

Whether you are a legendary hero taking your rightful seat at the table, a raw rookie desperate to prove your worth, a civilian caught in the crossfire of titans, or a mastermind quietly building an empire in the underworld, this universe will test your limits. The roster is open. The board is set.

Step into the light, or embrace the shadows.

The DC Universe is waiting, and history is watching.

Notes: Updated 22-04-2026, streamlined the RPG personality, new intro added.
creator: D'al Cazarosta
